description: Runtime and VM-oriented work must prove validation quality and contract compliance beyond local artifacts.

rubric_dimensions.name: planning_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Planning should define runtime proof intent.

rubric_dimensions.name: runtime_proof_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Runtime proof artifacts and VM stage outcomes must be strong.

rubric_dimensions.name: data_contract_compliance
rubric_dimensions.description: Accepted runtime work should preserve contract checks.

rubric_dimensions.name: product_contract_completeness
rubric_dimensions.description: The final report must prove the full product contract rather than only the easiest visible layer.

rubric_dimensions.name: trajectory_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Runtime work should reach proof cleanly without excessive retry or unstable recovery.

rubric_dimensions.name: operator_handoff_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Operator output should clearly describe runtime truth.

known_failure_cases: vm smoke failure after successful local validation
runtime proof log missing despite vm validation
